files.00_Overview.md: Complete 3W Framework restructuring: add Learning Objectives section, expand 'What' with formal definition and mathematical context, elaborate 'Why' with consequences of inadequate testing (failed simulations, wasted compute), detail 'How' with specific OpenFOAM workflow. Add Learning Objectives table with action verbs. Include Prerequisites section. Replace Quick Reference with actionable 'When to Use' guide. Create Key Takeaways with 3-5 bullet summary.
files.01_Introduction.md: Major 3W restructuring needed: add Learning Objectives at top. Expand 'What' section beyond current brief overview to include formal V&V definitions and mathematical formulations. Elaborate 'Why' with industry case studies or consequences. Transform current 'How' content into structured step-by-step workflows. Add Prerequisites section. Replace code snippets with structured 'Implementation Steps'. Include Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways. Remove duplicate content that overlaps with Overview.
files.02a_Method_of_Manufactured_Solutions_MMS: Add frontmatter with Learning Objectives and prerequisites. Structure content using explicit 'What', 'Why', 'How' headers. Current content has good OpenFOAM context but needs clearer 3W labeling. Add 'When to Use' decision tree comparing MMS vs other methods. Include Key Takeaways summarizing MMS workflow steps. Reduce redundancy between inline code examples and main text. Add troubleshooting section with common MMS pitfalls.
files.02b_Richardson_Extrapolation_GCI.md: Restructure with explicit 3W Framework headers. Add Learning Objectives focusing on GCI calculation and interpretation. Current Python code example is good—place it in dedicated 'Implementation' section. Add 'When to Use' comparing Richardson vs MMS. Include Key Takeaways with GCI formula summary. Add troubleshooting for common issues (asymptotic range, oscillatory convergence). Prerequisites section needed.
files.03_OpenFOAM_Architecture.md: Complete refactor needed: currently lacks structure. Add Learning Objectives. Organize under explicit 'What' (architecture components), 'Why' (testing relevance), 'How' (testing entry points). Current content is too brief—expand with concrete testing examples for each class. Add 'Testing Patterns' section with common workflows. Include Key Takeaways. Add cross-references to specific solver locations in OpenFOAM codebase.

global_strategy: Folder-wide systematic restructuring: (1) Apply consistent 3W Framework with explicit headers in every file, (2) Add Learning Objectives at the beginning of each file using action verbs, (3) Include Prerequisites section before main content, (4) Add Key Takeaways at end summarizing 3-5 essential points, (5) Create 'When to Use This Method' decision guides where applicable, (6) Eliminate redundancy—Verification vs Validation definitions appear in both Overview and Introduction, consolidate in Overview with reference, (7) Standardize OpenFOAM context boxes format, (8) Ensure progression: Overview → Concepts → Methods (MMS, Richardson) → Architecture implementation, (9) Add cross-references between related topics, (10) Replace brief content with expanded explanations while maintaining conciseness.
